candidate_definition_hints.text: [IEEE TCSVT2023] A Fine-grained Subjective Perception & Alignment Database for AI Generated Image Quality Assessment

The AGIQA-3K is a fine-grained AI-Generated Image (AGI) subjective quality assessment database. Please refer to our paper (AGIQA-3K: An Open Database for AI-Generated Image Quality Assessment) [here](https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.04717) for more details.

candidate_glosses.text: The AGIQA-3K is a fine-grained AI-Generated Image (AGI) subjective quality assessment database. Please refer to our paper (AGIQA-3K: An Open Database for AI-Generated Image Quality Assessment) [here](https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.04717) for more details.
